subject: a few shortcut keus
body:
Hi Dimitry,

I've completely my workflow to start with Warp now. Thank you so much for 
this great piece of work.A few shortcut keys  would be very handy during 
review of dataset:
1. toggle select/unselect
2. toggle denoise on/off
3. toggle defocus color overlay on/off
4. toggle particles show/hide
